description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-popup` (T4-04) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popup/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, anchor prop typed (selector or element ref), placement typed, active prop typed, strategy typed (absolute/fixed)
2. Accessibility — not a dialog itself (positioning utility), consumers responsible for ARIA — document this clearly, does not trap focus, axe-core pass in isolation
3. Tests — placement calculation (all 12 positions), flip behavior when out of viewport, shift behavior, arrow positioning, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all placements, flip demo, shift demo, arrow demo
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens for z-index, transition, CSS parts (popup, arrow)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, uses CSS Anchor Positioning API or Floating UI
7. Drupal — JS utility — Twig for markup only

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popup/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-popup — T4-04 antagonistic quality review
